description: Style Note Carry your essentials conveniently in these wallets from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather,  these wallets can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from Fossil.  Product Details Brown leather wallet with three-folds Has one main compartment Has eight card slots, three insert pockets and two id card holders   Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
